Text_EN: Mom, can’t you come to the sports day today?
Text_JP: ママ、今日の運動会来られないの？

Text_KR: 난 집에 돌아갈 때가 제일 싫어.
Text_EN: I hate the walk back home the most.
Text_JP: 家に帰るときが一番嫌だ。

Text_EN: It’s just so quiet without anyone there.
Text_JP: 誰もいなくて静かなんだ。

Text_KR: 이번 가을이 내가 겪은 최악의 가을이었어.
Text_EN: This has been the worst autumn of my life.
Text_JP: この秋は、私が経験した中で最悪の秋だった。

Text_EN: Can I really never see you again?
Text_JP: もう本当に会えないの…？

Text_EN: The winter feels far too long...
Would it be easier if I just fell asleep?
Text_JP: 眠ったら楽になれるかな…？

Text_EN: You’re such a great singer, sweetie.
Text_JP: うちの娘は歌も上手だね。

Text_EN: Shall I read you a bedtime story tonight, too?
Text_JP: 今日も絵本読んであげようか？

Text_EN: I won first place in the track and field meet!!
Text_JP: 陸上大会で1位取ったよ！！

Text_EN: I love you, Mom and Dad!
The amusement park is so much fun!
You are, and always will be, our pride and joy.
Text_JP: あなたはいつも私たちの誇りだよ。

Text_KR: 엄마가 해준 강낭콩 밥이 제일 맛있어!
Text_EN: Mom, your kidney bean rice is my absolute favorite!
Text_JP: ママが作ってくれたインゲン豆ご飯が一番おいしい！

Text_EN: People are more important than any award or certificate.
Text_JP: 賞状より大切なのは人だよ。

Text_EN: To us, you are the most important person in the whole world.
Text_JP: 私たちにとって、あなたが一番大切な人なんだよ。
